description: You are an environmental scientist working for the Emilia-Romagna Regional Environmental Agency (ARPAE) conducting a before-after emission impact study for a proposed Low Emission Zone (LEZ) in the Pasubio corridor using the SUMO scenario at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/. Generate a baseline emission report at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/baseline_emissions.xml using the scenario's HBEFA2 emission classes. Implement an LEZ by restricting high-polluting vehicle types on at least five core edges using at least two distinct restriction strategies, then generate the LEZ emission output at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/lez_emissions.xml. Produce a comparative impact assessment CSV at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/emission_impact_report.csv with columns for pollutant, baseline_total_mg, lez_total_mg, and reduction_pct for CO2, CO, NOx, PMx, and HC. Document the LEZ design, numerical results, and policy recommendations in a professional summary at /home/ga/SUMO_Output/emission_impact_summary.txt.
